docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSCH, ERIN (RESPONDENT) AS TO DEFENDANT STEINER PRINTS (APPELLANT) STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE; EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS ORDERED DESTROYED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR 09:38AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. THE RESPONDENT, ERIN BOSCH, IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. THE APPELLANT IS REPRESENTED BY THE OWNER WHO IS ALSO COUNSEL, BOOTS WHITMER. WITNESS S&E AND EXHIBITS IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. BOTH SIDES STIPULATE AND SUBMIT.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEINER PRINTS (APPELLANT) $281.15 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $281.15, COSTS PER COST BILL.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR OCT-16-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 503
COURT TRIAL AT DEPT. 503,BEFORE COMM. SUE KAPLAN.
